programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: After an eccentric recluse dies, arguments over a piece of historic Cabot Cove property and the contents of her estate lead to murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A rude maître d' (Dick Gautier) is murdered at the New York restaurant in which Jessica has just invested.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica probes a suspicious accident while visiting her niece (Kristy McNichol) on the Canadian rodeo circuit.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: When the feud of two drama critics ends in murder, Jessica has a full cast of suspects, including the surviving critic.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is caught in a game of deadly politics when a close friend's campaign is threatened by scandal.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: After an eccentric recluse dies, arguments over a piece of historic Cabot Cove property and the contents of her estate lead to murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A rude maître d' (Dick Gautier) is murdered at the New York restaurant in which Jessica has just invested.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica probes a suspicious accident while visiting her niece (Kristy McNichol) on the Canadian rodeo circuit.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: When Jessica is arrested for murder, secret agent Michael Haggerty (Len Cariou) and her nephew Grady conspire to keep her safely in jail while they seek the real killer.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica attends a fund-raiser for a New York publisher, and he is found dead, and his wife's diamond necklace is missing from his safe.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates when bodies start turning up in the Apple-tree sisters' (Joan Leslie, Teresa Wright) house and garden.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the murders of U.S. World Cup skiers while snowed in at a ski area holding tryouts.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries
programme.desc: Archaeologist Emma Fielding unearths evidence of a 17th-century coastal Maine settlement that predates Jamestown, but the dead body that accompanies it embroils Emma and her students in a different kind of investigation.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries
programme.desc: While hosting a gathering of the Association for the Study of American Archaeology, Emma Fielding is thrust into the middle of a murder mystery when the president of her organization is poisoned on the eve of announcing her successor.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries
programme.desc: Emma is hired to consult on the acquisition of a castle-like estate that local legends claim carries a curse.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Mum's the Word
programme.desc: With help from a former Marine (Brennan Elliott), a widow (Brooke Shields) investigates a murder after her friend becomes the prime suspect.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Snipped in the Bud
programme.desc: A small-town florist (Brooke Shields) becomes a prime suspect in the murder of a former courtroom adversary.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Dearly Depotted
programme.desc: Abby Knight is a beautiful ex-attorney and proprietor of Bloomers, a quaint Illinois flower shop.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica becomes embroiled in a town's tensions while investigating the shooting death of a coal mine owner.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Searching for a stolen tiara, Jessica meets the reclusive actress (Jean Peters) for whom it was designed.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: The Last Flight of the Dixie Damsel
programme.desc: The airplane Jessica's late husband bailed out of in 1952 is finally found, but it with a body inside.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A psychic's (David Birney) dire predictions disrupt Jessica's visit to a friend's (Dale Robertson) Arizona ranch.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates a murder committed at her nephew's wedding.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica becomes embroiled in a town's tensions while investigating the shooting death of a coal mine owner.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Searching for a stolen tiara, Jessica meets the reclusive actress (Jean Peters) for whom it was designed.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: The Last Flight of the Dixie Damsel
programme.desc: The airplane Jessica's late husband bailed out of in 1952 is finally found, but it with a body inside.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a young model dies after a workout, Jesse and Mark learn she wasn't the all-natural person she appeared to be.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda learn that a plane crash is a case of murder involving a dead FBI agent, the Russian mob and a missing nuclear bomb.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda learn that a plane crash is a case of murder involving a dead FBI agent, the Russian mob and a missing nuclear bomb.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A network president is murdered and so is her successor; Michele Greene; Erik Estrada; Doug E. Doug; Jane Seymour; Fred Willard; John Aniston; Jaleel White; Reginald VelJohnson; Stephen J. Cannell; Dr. Joyce Brothers.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Daniel Chalmers (Efrem Zimbalist Jr.) convinces protege Remington to pose as the long-lost heir to an English duke's estate.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: In Ireland Laura helps Remington elude killers after an injury leaves him unable to recall who he is or why he came overseas.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Remington sees himself in a teenage pickpocket (Meeno Peluce) who stole photographs needed to prosecute a loan shark.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Defending a game-show host (Peter Haskell) accused of killing his producer, Ben learns others had motives.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock risks being disbarred when he accuses the deputy district attorney of misconduct in her case against his client.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben finds a photo that may solve a murder while looking for his cousin's (Christina Pickles) philandering husband.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben uses evidence in an altered photo to uncover a murder plot designed to conceal a counterfeiting operation.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Frugal Ben hires a hitchhiker (Randy Travis) to paint his home; Michelle and an insurance adjuster pursue an ad producer's murderer.

programme.title: Hannah Swensen Mysteries
programme.sub-title: Sugar & Vice: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah finds a body at the grand re-opening of the Lake Eden Inn; when a storm traps everyone inside, Hannah must find the culprit before the road clears and the killer escapes.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries
programme.desc: When Jennifer's friend and self-storage facility owner Martin turns up murdered just hours after auctioning off an abandoned storage unit full of unique items to Jennifer, she is immediately pulled on the case as a key eyewitness.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Things look bad when a married woman's keys are found by the body in a motel room, and she can't explain why.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the reappearance of an heir who had been missing for over 20 years.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica poses as a wealthy patient to probe the murder of a vagabond identified as the hospital's accountant.
